sizing_rule.note: Position size = (1% account risk / ATR_20) × 0.25. Scales position inversely to 20-day Average True Range volatility; higher volatility reduces position size, lower volatility increases it.

source_rule_text: Position sizing method has a dramatic impact on trading returns; volatility-based position sizing (using Average True Range) outperforms fixed-unit and baseline approaches by orders of magnitude.
